data.title: harvest-worktree blocks on test-gate-status=failed for RED test-only commits
data.description: When a worktree contains only RED test files (implementation does not exist yet), record-test-status.sh writes test-gate-status=failed because all tests fail. harvest-worktree.sh then blocks with 'ERROR: test-gate-status is failed (expected passed)'. The pre-commit test gate exempts test-only commits from requiring passed test-gate-status (passes without checking), but harvest-worktree.sh has no equivalent exemption. Fix: harvest-worktree.sh should accept test-gate-status=failed when all failing tests are covered by RED markers in .test-index, or the per-worktree-review-commit.md protocol should explicitly skip record-test-status.sh for RED test-only worktrees.
